message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add missing gitignore rules for agent-generated runtime artifacts that
should never be committed: SQLite backup/corruption files, RCH build
directories, UBS scan outputs, agent mail project IDs, macOS resource
forks, temp fix scripts, and prompt dump files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -63,6 +63,9 @@ spec_review_findings.md
 # Local scratch SQLite DBs (never tracked)
 storage.sqlite3
 storage.sqlite3-*
+*.sqlite3.bak
+*.sqlite3-wal.bak
+*.sqlite3.corrupt-*
 
 # E2E fixture corpus (local only; DB bytes never tracked)
 sample_sqlite_db_files/golden/*
